Operation 'chat_completions' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, unclear_purpose, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Operation has no summary or description, making it impossible for AI agents to understand its purpose. Added clear action verb, domain context (code completions), input expectations (chat messages), output format (completion choices), and capability information (streaming support) based on the API's code completion focus.

data.description_suggestion: Generates code completions using a chat-based interface. Accepts a conversation history with system, user, and assistant messages to provide contextual code suggestions. Returns completion choices with generated code snippets. Supports streaming responses for real-time completion delivery.
data.reasoning: Operation has no summary or description, making it impossible for AI agents to understand its purpose. Added clear action verb, domain context (code completions), input expectations (chat messages), output format (completion choices), and capability information (streaming support) based on the API's code completion focus.

message: Operation 'completion' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, unclear_purpose, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Operation lacks summary and description entirely. Added action-oriented summary, explained the CompletionRequest schema usage, clarified the response format (CompletionResponse), and provided context about typical use cases to help AI agents determine when to invoke this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Generates code completions based on provided source code context. Accepts a CompletionRequest containing code context, cursor position, and language information. Returns a CompletionResponse with completion choices containing suggested code snippets. Useful for IDE integration and real-time code suggestion features.
data.reasoning: Operation lacks summary and description entirely. Added action-oriented summary, explained the CompletionRequest schema usage, clarified the response format (CompletionResponse), and provided context about typical use cases to help AI agents determine when to invoke this operation.

message: Operation 'event' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, unclear_purpose, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Missing summary and description prevents AI agents from understanding this operation's purpose. Added clear action (log events), explained the LogEventRequest schema, clarified the side effect (event persistence), and specified the response behavior to help agents understand when to use this for telemetry.

data.description_suggestion: Records user interaction and completion events for analytics and monitoring. Accepts a LogEventRequest containing event type, timestamp, and completion metadata. Events are persisted for usage tracking and system improvement. No response body is returned; successful submission returns HTTP 200.
data.reasoning: Missing summary and description prevents AI agents from understanding this operation's purpose. Added clear action (log events), explained the LogEventRequest schema, clarified the side effect (event persistence), and specified the response behavior to help agents understand when to use this for telemetry.

message: Operation 'health' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, unclear_purpose, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Operation has no summary or description. Added action-oriented summary, explained the HealthState response schema, and provided context about typical usage patterns (pre-flight checks, monitoring) to help AI agents understand when to call this diagnostic endpoint.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current health status of the Tabby server. Returns a HealthState object containing system information including model status, device information, and service availability. Use this endpoint to verify server readiness before making completion requests or to monitor ongoing service health.
data.reasoning: Operation has no summary or description. Added action-oriented summary, explained the HealthState response schema, and provided context about typical usage patterns (pre-flight checks, monitoring) to help AI agents understand when to call this diagnostic endpoint.
